mapper.select: SELECT MSG.CO_ID, MSG.MSG_ID, MSG.DFLT_MSG_VAL, MSG.MDL_NM, MSG.MSG_TP_VAL, MSG.CRE_DT, MSG.CRE_USR_ID, MSG.UPD_DT, MSG.UPD_USR_ID FROM COM_MSG MSG WHERE MSG.CO_ID = #{coId} AND MSG.MSG_ID = #{msgId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COM_MSG ( CO_ID, MSG_ID, DFLT_MSG_VAL, MDL_NM, MSG_TP_VAL, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{msgId}, #{dfltMsgVal}, #{mdlNm}, #{msgTpVal}, #{creUsrId}, #{updUsrId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE COM_MSG SET DFLT_MSG_VAL = #{dfltMsgVal}, MDL_NM = #{mdlNm}, MSG_TP_VAL = #{msgTpVal}, UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = NOW() WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND MSG_ID = #{msgId}
mapper.select: SELECT TRANS.CO_ID, TRANS.MSG_ID, TRANS.LANG_VAL, TRANS.TRANS_MSG_VAL, TRANS.CRE_DT, TRANS.CRE_USR_ID, TRANS.UPD_DT, TRANS.UPD_USR_ID FROM COM_MSG_TRANS TRANS WHERE TRANS.CO_ID = #{coId} AND TRANS.MSG_ID = #{msgId} ORDER BY TRANS.LANG_VAL ASC

SELECT TRANS.CO_ID, TRANS.MSG_ID, TRANS.LANG_VAL, TRANS.TRANS_MSG_VAL, TRANS.CRE_DT, TRANS.CRE_USR_ID, TRANS.UPD_DT, TRANS.UPD_USR_ID FROM COM_MSG_TRANS TRANS WHERE TRANS.CO_ID = #{coId} AND TRANS.MSG_ID = #{msgId} AND TRANS.LANG_VAL = #{langVal} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COM_MSG_TRANS ( CO_ID, MSG_ID, LANG_VAL, TRANS_MSG_VAL, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{msgId}, #{langVal}, #{transMsgVal}, #{creUsrId}, #{updUsrId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: INSERT INTO COM_MSG_TRANS ( CO_ID, MSG_ID, LANG_VAL, TRANS_MSG_VAL, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{msgId}, #{langVal}, #{transMsgVal}, #{creUsrId}, #{updUsrId}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (CO_ID, MSG_ID, LANG_VAL) DO UPDATE SET TRANS_MSG_VAL = #{transMsgVal}, UPD_USR_ID = #{updUsrId}, UPD_DT = NOW()
